title: oxalis hirta
intro: Oxalis hirta, also known as the hairy wood sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a diuretic. Oxalis hirta can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some cases as a food ingredient, adding a tangy flavor to salads and other dishes.
